name: Coles Group Limited.
analysis: COL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 2% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$23.7700, stop A$21.9582, target A$29.2054 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
